# Baholo Projects

Baholo Projects (Pty) Ltd is a South African Level 1 B-BBEE company established in 2016 and registered in 2019.

## Services

- Industrial supplies: metal industrial valves, pumps, fittings, pipes, bolts and nuts.
- Office supplies and furniture: printers, copier machines, electrical appliances, coffee makers, water dispensers and related items.
- Property maintenance: painting, cracked-wall and floor repairs, plumbing, metalwork, gardening and landscaping.
- Welding and fabrication: fabrication, modification and practical design of new and existing systems.

## Customers

Baholo Projects serves small and large enterprises in South Africa.

## Contact
